headline: A Look At Cooper Companies (COO) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance snapshot Cooper Companies (COO) has drawn investor attention after a stretch of weaker share performance, with the stock down 2% over the past month and about 27% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Cooper Companies. At a share price of US$61.21, Cooper Companies has seen short term share price momentum soften. The 7 day share price return is down 2.14% and the 90 day share price return is down 26.58%, while the 1 year total shareholder return declined...

headline: Seeking Clues to The Cooper Companies (COO) Q2 Earnings? A Peek Into Wall Street Projections for Key Metrics
summary: Beyond analysts' top-and-bottom-line estimates for The Cooper Companies (COO), evaluate projections for some of its key metrics to gain a better insight into how the business might have performed for the quarter ended April 2026.

headline: Piper Sandler Reiterates Overweight on Cooper Companies, Lowers Price Target to $86
summary: Piper Sandler  analyst Jason Bednar   reiterates Cooper Companies (NASDAQ:COO) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $94 to $86.
